# Focus4ward

> Marketing leadership and AI systems for B2B growth, by Miri Blum. Fractional CMO and AI Marketing Systems Builder based in Paris, working globally.

Focus4ward provides Fractional CMO services and builds AI-powered marketing systems for B2B companies. Founder Miri Blum has 18 years of B2B marketing experience including senior roles at AWS, Criteo, Brevo, and Aprovall.

The positioning is dual-buyer: for founders who need a CMO, and for CMOs who need AI.

## Pages

- [Home](https://focus4ward.co/): Overview, positioning, and proof
- [Services](https://focus4ward.co/services): Fractional CMO retainer, AI Readiness Audit, AI Systems Build, Brand and Positioning Sprint
- [Results](https://focus4ward.co/results): Case studies — Aprovall, Brevo, Assurly, Criteo
- [About](https://focus4ward.co/about): About Miri Blum, philosophy, career
- [Blog](https://focus4ward.co/blog): Articles on Fractional CMO, AI marketing, B2B growth
- [AI marketing systems for B2B](https://focus4ward.co/blog/ai-marketing-systems-for-b2b): Pillar guide — what an AI marketing system is (connected workflows, not tools), the five components (data/context, workflow logic, model, review gate, output loop), the build-vs-buy decision per workflow (differentiator vs utility), and the four-rung maturity path (prompt-curious, tooled, systematic, compounding)
- [Marketing audit and AI readiness audit](https://focus4ward.co/marketing-audit): Reference page for the audit product — what a marketing function audit covers (positioning, GTM, channels, ops, team, KPIs, AI readiness), the AI readiness audit, how it runs over 2-3 weeks in 6 phases, cost (fixed-fee AI Readiness Audit; bespoke at day rate from 1350 EUR HT), audit vs consulting vs fractional CMO comparison table, and the 30/60/90-day deliverable.
- [Glossary](https://focus4ward.co/glossary): Definitions of B2B marketing and AI terms — fractional CMO, AI marketing system, marketing audit, GTM strategy, ICP, brand positioning, MOps, GEO, attribution model, B2B SaaS playbook
- [Fractional CMO Paris](https://focus4ward.co/fractional-cmo-paris): Geo-page for the Paris market — who I work with, why Paris matters for French B2B, how a Paris engagement works
- [Fractional CMO vs Marketing Agency](https://focus4ward.co/fractional-cmo-vs-agency): Honest comparison — fractional owns the function, agency owns the project. When to pick each, and when to use both.
- [Fractional CMO vs Marketing Consultant](https://focus4ward.co/fractional-cmo-vs-consultant): Honest comparison — fractional executes, consultant recommends. When to pick each, and when to use both.
- [Fractional CMO vs Full-Time CMO](https://focus4ward.co/fractional-cmo-vs-full-time): Honest comparison — cost, ramp time, hiring fees, exit risk in France, and the bridge model from fractional to full-time hire.
- [Fractional CMO for B2B SaaS](https://focus4ward.co/blog/fractional-cmo-for-b2b-saas): Segment guide — SaaS-specific scope, PLG vs sales-led decision framework, the SaaS metrics marketing owns (CAC/LTV/NRR/activation rate), and where AI systems change the execution equation.
- [Fractional CMO cost guide](https://focus4ward.co/blog/how-much-does-a-fractional-cmo-cost): Pricing-transparency answer page — day-rate model explained, what drives the range, full-time vs fractional vs agency vs consultant cost comparison table.
- [Interim CMO vs Fractional CMO](https://focus4ward.co/blog/interim-cmo-vs-fractional-cmo): Comparison answer page — interim CMO is full-time and temporary (covers a vacant seat while you hire), fractional CMO is part-time and ongoing (senior leadership without a full-time hire). Side-by-side table and a decision framework for which one fits.
- [Fractional CMO for Series A startups](https://focus4ward.co/blog/fractional-cmo-for-series-a-startups): Post-raise guide for founders — what to do with the first marketing budget, what not to hire yet (VP of marketing first, junior-only teams, premature agency retainers), the system-first build, the first 90 days, and a side-by-side table of fractional vs full-time CMO vs agency vs junior hire at Series A.
- [Hiring a Fractional CMO: direct vs through a company](https://focus4ward.co/blog/fractional-cmo-agency-vs-independent): Decision answer page — two routes to fractional marketing leadership. Direct (hire one named CMO who owns your numbers) vs through a productized/subscription service (the company sources/assigns an operator, billed flat monthly). Covers the economics (operator rate plus intermediary margin), the freelancer-vs-productized and retainer-vs-subscription questions, and the control/accountability/continuity trade-off, with a side-by-side table.
- [Senior fractional CMO day rate](https://focus4ward.co/blog/senior-fractional-cmo-day-rate-worth-it): Total-cost answer page — why a senior fractional CMO's higher day rate (TJM) often costs less overall. Seniority is a different product (fewer days billed, faster time-to-result), and a directly-hired senior operator owns the revenue number with continuity, versus subscription/managed-team models framed around deliverables. Compare total cost and time-to-impact, not the headline rate. Side-by-side table.
- [What does a fractional CMO do](https://focus4ward.co/blog/what-does-a-fractional-cmo-do): Definition answer page — the role, scope, and day-to-day of a fractional CMO, and how it differs from adjacent models.
- [When to hire a fractional CMO](https://focus4ward.co/blog/when-to-hire-a-fractional-cmo): Timing answer page — the signals and timing triggers that indicate a company needs fractional marketing leadership.
- [How to hire a fractional CMO](https://focus4ward.co/blog/how-to-hire-a-fractional-cmo): Selection guide — name the gap before writing the role, separate builders from slide-makers, the questions to ask, the red flags, and scoping the engagement around outcomes.
- [Top 5 benefits of hiring a fractional CMO](https://focus4ward.co/blog/top-5-benefits-of-hiring-a-fractional-cmo): Benefits answer page for B2B growth companies.
- [Citation is the new ranking](https://focus4ward.co/blog/citation-is-the-new-ranking): GEO explainer — how B2B brands win visibility when buyers query AI engines instead of Google, and why citation share is the new SEO metric.
- [Your B2B buyers aren't clicking anymore](https://focus4ward.co/blog/your-b2b-buyers-arent-clicking-anymore): The shift from search clicks to AI answers in B2B buying behaviour.
- [The AI maturity ladder](https://focus4ward.co/blog/the-ai-maturity-ladder): The 4 levels of marketing teams using AI — prompt-curious, tooled, systematic, compounding — and how to locate your real rung.
- [Buying an enterprise AI licence is not an AI strategy](https://focus4ward.co/blog/buying-enterprise-ai-licence-is-not-a-strategy): Why an enterprise AI subscription without architecture, connectivity, and workflow design changes nothing.
- [The Day-One Consideration List](https://focus4ward.co/blog/the-day-one-consideration-list): How enterprise B2B buyers really decide — the shortlist forms before the first sales conversation.
- [Rename or rebrand](https://focus4ward.co/blog/rename-vs-rebrand): The diagnostic founders get wrong — when a rename is needed, when a rebrand is, and when neither.
- [Contact](https://focus4ward.co/contact): Book a call

## Pages en français

- [Accueil FR](https://focus4ward.co/fr/): French homepage — Fractional CMO et systèmes marketing IA pour entreprises B2B
- [Services FR](https://focus4ward.co/fr/services): Services en français — Fractional CMO, audit AI Readiness, construction de systèmes IA
- [Résultats FR](https://focus4ward.co/fr/results): Études de cas en français
- [À propos FR](https://focus4ward.co/fr/about): À propos de Miri Blum, dirigeante marketing senior bilingue basée à Paris
- [Fractional CMO : le guide complet](https://focus4ward.co/fr/fractional-cmo): Guide de référence en français — définition (directeur marketing externalisé / à temps partiel), quand y faire appel, TJM et coût complet vs CDI, comparaison avec agence/consultant/CDI, le critère IA, comment choisir.
- [Fractional CMO à Paris](https://focus4ward.co/fr/fractional-cmo-paris): Page locale Paris en français — avec qui je travaille, pourquoi Paris compte pour le B2B français, déroulement d'une mission, bilingue FR/EN.
- [Contact FR](https://focus4ward.co/fr/contact): Prendre rendez-vous

## About Miri Blum

- Role: Fractional CMO and AI Marketing Systems Builder
- Based in: Paris, France
- Languages: English, French
- Works: Globally
- Past roles:
  - VP Global Marketing at Brevo (formerly Sendinblue)
  - Senior Partner Marketing Manager at AWS (Amazon Web Services)
  - Head of Brand and Creative at Criteo (during Nasdaq IPO)
  - Fractional CMO at Aprovall (formerly e-Attestations)
- Specialties: Fractional CMO, B2B marketing leadership, AI marketing systems, brand strategy, positioning, GTM strategy, demand generation, product marketing, marketing-sales alignment

## Services and engagement models

- **AI Readiness Audit** (2 weeks, fixed fee): Audit of marketing stack, processes, AI gaps. Output: prioritised 90-day roadmap.
- **AI Systems Build** (2-4 weeks, fixed fee): Custom AI workflows built and handed over with team training. Content factory, competitive intelligence, lead gen engine, SEO/GEO workflow.
- **Brand and Positioning Sprint** (3 weeks, fixed fee): Positioning, messaging architecture, ICP definition, value proposition.
- **Fractional CMO retainer** (3-18 months, monthly): Embedded marketing leadership with AI systems built in.

## Notable results

- Aprovall: ↑52% new logo revenue YoY, ↑105% MQLs YoY, ↑771% organic search sessions, ↑224% AI visibility in TPRM category. Recognised in the Gartner 2025 TPRM Market Guide and Forrester 2026 Landscape.
- Brevo: ↑65% new product MRR, ↑700% social engagement, ↑65% brand uplift, ↑25% YoY growth via campaigns. Led the rebrand from Sendinblue to Brevo.
- Assurly: 100 paying clients onboarded in 6 months, ↑803% media presence, ↑22% user acquisition CVR, top 100 in the FinTech industry within the first year.
- Criteo: ↑121% lead gen CVR YoY, ↑602% engagement YoY, ↑77% brand visibility YoY, ↑67% YoY subscriptions on social. Global brand repositioning during Nasdaq IPO across APAC, EMEA, and NAM.

## Contact

- Email: miri@focus4ward.co
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/miriblum/
- Location: Paris, France (works globally)
- [B2B positioning framework](https://focus4ward.co/blog/b2b-positioning-framework): The step-by-step positioning method — five steps from competitive alternatives to market category, the difference between positioning and messaging, why most positioning dies in the deck, and the live sales-call test that proves it holds.
- [Marketing measurement framework for B2B](https://focus4ward.co/blog/marketing-measurement-framework-b2b): Leading vs lagging indicators, why multi-touch attribution alone is not enough, and the three-tier board-ready view (pipeline health, program efficiency, brand and category signal) that ties marketing activity to revenue without overstating the story.
- [First marketing hire](https://focus4ward.co/blog/first-marketing-hire-b2b): Why founders sequence the first marketing hire backwards, hiring a junior generalist before a strategy exists for them to execute. The senior-strategist-vs-junior-doer trade-off, the real cost of a premature full-time hire, and when a fractional leader wins the first-hire decision instead.
